imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Modern minimalist app logo icon for news reader (blinkt-logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Placeholder thumbnail for articles without images showing abstract news iconography (article-placeholder.dim_400x300.png)

existing_features.title: Create a news feed interface displaying article cards with headlines, source information, publication time, and thumbnail images in a scrollable vertical list
Create category navigation allowing users to filter news by topics such as Technology, Business, Sports, Entertainment, and General news
Implement article detail view that displays full article content, source attribution, publication date, and allows users to open the original article link
Add user bookmarking functionality allowing users to save articles for later reading with a dedicated bookmarks section
Implement search functionality enabling users to search articles by keywords in titles and content

Create a modern mobile-optimized news reader interface with a clean, minimalist design featuring bold typography, comfortable spacing, smooth transitions, and a cohesive color scheme that prioritizes readability and content focus

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement backend data model for news articles including fields for title, source, publication timestamp, content snippet, thumbnail URL, and article URL
